description: EARLY INTRA-WINDOW POLL (~4.86h after prior 18:17Z poll, well inside the 12h cadence — caller-scheduled, not a missed-cadence catch-up). Manual-commit drought has lengthened past 10.46d / 251.1h (was 10.25d / 246.18h at prior poll); 18 consecutive polls of auto-only commits; last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. ALL 7 page hashes BYTE-IDENTICAL to prior poll: home cb47aab7d62a8380d7f15c35afc0d4db, wins 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 (69 distinct WIN-NNN, max WIN-069), predictions 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785, coordinates 5127700325dc0b2bf69a0eea7a94df06, model 28cef1a65d65bf6a0a3b0f77458d203d, evolution 93f99dd70d6d52fbb5616cbc5fec5aa5; ai-context still 404 (baseline). Canary OTS-provenance trap unchanged: 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots, status_history.json.ots), no new ones, 0 commit messages with provenance / separate-predictions / timestamp-predictions / pre-register / isolation / separate-observation keywords across last 30 commits. MEDIUM priority because (1) the manual-commit drought continues to lengthen past the 10-day threshold the prior poll explicitly designated as a re-escalation criterion (now 10.46d, slope unchanged), and (2) the 18-poll auto-only streak continues to extend the structural autonomy of the dome's deployment pipeline relative to its human author. Not HIGH this poll — no NEW landmark fired; this is a continuation snapshot inside the watch window. Does not yet rise to CRITICAL — no source-file touch, no goalpost-move, no canary trigger.
